race.comment: RUBIQUITY (3) was on speed winning over this distance at Naracoorte and looks to have turned the corner. In good hands and winning form is good form in this contest. PORT LOUIS (2) is busting to win and Hurdle is reunited. Ran a good number at Terang last time and has winning claims. DESIGNS OF EIGHT (4) resumes and will be at his best over longer. Regardless, she's placed in her two recent jumpouts and John Allen's engagement suggests she's pleasing. Has a low gate and is good enough. SWEET CITY DANCER (8) has a handy barrier and Yendall and may be ready to show more here. Can get some of the minor money.
